roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Memorandum to the Court - Restitution
Order for Victim Restitution (CR-110) & Abstract of Judgment for Restitution (CR-111) for victims Jose Crispin Parades and RHL Fire Protection Services

/CAL  SENTENCING/TWS/CH10 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ    7D/CTS   7 /CTORD  HARVEY WAIVER OF TERMS AND CONDITIONS FROM 2526504 INTO 21007462/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:02-02-22/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/WS/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/X: FINES AND FEES ARE STAYED PURSUANT TO DUENAS/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/DOPU: ATTY AUTHORIZATION/

/CAL  PRELIMINARY HEARING/X  DA ORALLY AMENDS INFORMATION TO ADD COUNT 10PC 32 - MISD/FAWA/IRR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 10/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION FOR FIRST DISMISSAL OF THIS CASE IS GRANTED,/X:ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO IMMEDIATRE RE-FILING AND ARRAIGNMENT ON THE SAME COMPLAINT,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:12-20-21/CONTD:DISPOSITION ORTO SET IN DEPARTMENT 11/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING VACATED BY STIPULATIONOF THE PARTIES,/STIPLD:11-01-21/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 09-30-21IN DEPARTMENT 11/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 10-13-21 IN DEPARTMENT 20/DOPC/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X: THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTIION TO CONTINUE THE PRELIMINARY HEARING BEYONDTHE 10TH DAY IN THIS CASE,/OR/SA2:1700 EGBERT AVE,, S,F, CA/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: EAN VIZZI/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-16-21 (10),09-14-21 (30), 10-01-21 (60)/987,2/BAIL:75000/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SA2: 1700 EGBERT AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/X: NO WRITTEN STAY AWAY ORDER WAS FILED IN COURT,/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/TE: 1 DAY/
/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/TE:45 MIN/CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU:ATTY AUTH/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:THE CO-DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/CONT/DOP/
